settings.ggCKxnWloLD_text: Do You Still Have Any Doubts?
settings.ggQVgYjz4RJ_childItem_0: Can I use it in SUMMER too since it contains retinol...?
settings.ggQVgYjz4RJ_childItem_3: Does it leave a greasy feeling on the skin?
settings.ggQVgYjz4RJ_childItem_4: How long does it take to see results?
settings.ggQVgYjz4RJ_childItem_7: What is the complete list of ingredients?
settings.ggkCktYhb1__text:
Yes, you can use it safely even in summer.

Omnis contains Retinyl Palmitate, a gentle and stable form of vitamin A that does NOT make the skin sensitive to the sun like other more aggressive types of retinol.

Retinyl Palmitate:

  • Does not cause irritation or redness
  • Does not increase sensitivity to UV rays
  • Can be used all year round without problems

     

Tip: As always when exposing your skin to the sun, use SPF 30+ sun protection during the day. This applies to everyone, regardless of the products you use.
The Omnis cream is formulated precisely to be used 365 days a year, summer included.
